title: generates corrupted cpp code with type mismatch on VlUnpacked vs const VlQueue
body:
In regressions of cases from the SystemVerilog LRM, legal case on 1800-2012 page 115 (or 1800-2023 page 159) generates corrupted cpp:

```
error: cannot convert ‘VlUnpacked<unsigned int, 3>’ to ‘const VlQueue<unsigned int>&’
| sv12_lrm_p0113_bit_nibble_dynamic__DOT__dest1.renew_copy(2U,
vlSelfRef.sv12_lrm_p0113_bit_nibble_dynamic__DOT__src);
|
VlUnpacked<unsigned int, 3>
```

**Code:**
```
module t;
  int src[3], dest1[], dest2[];
  initial begin
    src = '{2, 3, 4};
    dest1 = new[2] (src); // dest1's elements are {2, 3}.
    dest2 = new[4] (src); // dest2's elements are {2, 3, 4, 0}.
  end
endmodule
```

**Version:**
5.044

**Environment:**
Centos 7.9，GCC 11.5
